description: Texts about functions, derivatives, limits, slopes, formulas, mathematical reasoning, and calculus concepts.
Texts about variables, equations, factoring, polynomials, systems, and symbolic manipulation.
Programming tutorials, API documentation, code examples, parameters, return values, and developer guidance.
Retail product pages, product descriptions, offers, shipping, prices, features, and purchase calls to action.
Cookie banners, privacy notices, footers, menus, repeated navigation, and low-content web page noise.
Question and answer discussions, forum posts, comments, accepted answers, and conversational troubleshooting.
General educational articles, lessons, explainers, classroom material, and student-facing explanations.
Biology articles about cells, organisms, ecology, photosynthesis, DNA, evolution, and life sciences.
Physics articles about force, motion, energy, waves, electricity, experiments, and physical laws.
Environmental science articles about climate, pollution, ecosystems, emissions, water quality, and conservation.
Infrastructure explainers about transit, water systems, utilities, roads, maintenance, and urban planning.
Texts that mix English with Russian or other languages in a way that affects classification.
Government notices, public legal information, hearings, compliance notices, and official announcements.
Reference or wiki-style articles with neutral summaries, definitions, history, classification, and citations.
News-like reporting about recent events, officials, statements, dates, updates, and public developments.
Patent-style technical descriptions, claims, and procedures for point-of-sale systems, rentals, transactions, inventory, invoices, cash drawers, and retail terminals.
Patent-style or technical descriptions of computer hardware, networking interfaces, adapters, terminals, buses, ports, memory, data taps, and communication circuits.
Texts about probability, statistics, distributions, medians, means, forecasting accuracy, model evaluation, holdout sets, and statistical measures.
Texts about arithmetic, unit conversion, measurement, feet, inches, yards, ratios, basic calculations, and word problems involving quantities.
Chemistry tutorials and explainers about atoms, molecules, formulas, valence electrons, Lewis structures, elements, compounds, and chemical reasoning.
Texts about geometric figures, triangles, rectangles, diagrams, areas, shapes, angles, lengths, and geometry word problems.
Advanced mathematics texts about topology, closures, dense and nowhere dense sets, compactness, convergence, metric spaces, and real analysis concepts.
Texts about artists, artworks, exhibitions, art movements, art criticism, painting, museums, and art historical context.
Texts about social issues, public advocacy, gender, inequality, politics, community movements, violence prevention, and social policy.
Fallback label for unclear, ambiguous, or low-confidence text.
